channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [CELEBRITY] Celebrity Fashions gets listing approval for 4.87M preferential shares
item.description:
Celebrity Fashions Ltd has received listing approval from both BSE and NSE for 4,869,933 equity shares. These shares, with a face value of ₹10 each, were allotted on a preferential basis at a price of ₹10.31 per share, including a premium of ₹0.31. The approval, dated April 22, 2026, enables the company to list these shares on the exchanges. The company is required to comply with SEBI regulations, including filing shareholding patterns if there's a change exceeding 2% of the total paid-up capital. Trading approval for these shares will be granted upon confirmation from NSDL/CDSL regarding the crediting of shares to beneficiary accounts and lock-in of pre-preferential holdings. The company must apply for trading approval within seven working days from the date of listing approval.

  • Celebrity Fashions received listing approval for 4,869,933 equity shares.
  • Shares were issued on a preferential basis at ₹10.31 per share.
  • The approval facilitates the trading of these newly issued shares.
  • Company must ensure regulatory compliance for final trading approval.
  • Trading approval is contingent on depository confirmations and timely application.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: CELEBRITY FASHIONS LTD. | Category: Corporate Action

item.title: [MOTILALOFS] Motilal Oswal Board to meet Apr 29, 2026 for FY26 Audited Results
item.description:
Motilal Oswal Financial Services Ltd. has announced that its Board of Directors will convene a meeting on Wednesday, April 29, 2026. The primary agenda for this meeting is to consider and approve the Audited Financial Results (Standalone & Consolidated) for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. In compliance with SEBI regulations, the trading window for the company's securities, which closed on March 19, 2026, will remain shut and will only reopen 48 hours after the declaration of these financial results. The notice of this Board Meeting will be accessible on the company's website, as well as on the BSE and NSE websites.

  • Board meeting scheduled for April 29, 2026.
  • Purpose is to approve Q4 and FY26 Audited Financial Results.
  • Trading window remains closed until results declaration.
  • This is a routine announcement for financial results.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: MOTILAL OSWAL FINANCIAL SERVICES LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [LUPIN] Lupin Board to meet May 7, 2026 for Q4/FY26 results & dividend
item.description:
Lupin Ltd has announced that its Board of Directors will convene on Thursday, May 7, 2026. The primary agenda for this meeting is to consider and approve the Audited Standalone and Consolidated Financial Results for the quarter and fiscal year ended March 31, 2026. Additionally, the Board will discuss and potentially recommend a dividend. In compliance with insider trading regulations, the trading window for designated persons and their relatives has been closed from April 1, 2026, and will remain closed until May 10, 2026, which is 48 hours after the declaration of the financial results.

  • Board meeting scheduled for May 7, 2026.
  • To consider and approve Q4 and FY26 audited financial results.
  • Board to recommend dividend, if any.
  • Trading window closed from April 1, 2026.
  • Trading window re-opens on May 10, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: LUPIN LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [BHARATCOAL] BCCL Approves Q4/FY26 Results, Revises Coking Coal Prices
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Bharat Coking Coal Limited's Board of Directors, at its meeting on April 22, 2026, approved the Audited Financial Results for the 4th Quarter and Financial Year ended March 31, 2026. Additionally, the Board approved a revision in the price of Washed Coking Coal, effective from April 1, 2026, for Q1 FY2026-27. Washed Prime Coking Coal is now priced at ₹13,403/- per MT and Washed Medium Coking Coal at ₹10,937/- per MT. The Board also approved revised evacuation charges for washery products and a waiver of performance incentives and discounts for power consumers lifting beyond 100% of their Annual Contracted Quantity.

  • Audited financial results for Q4 and FY26 approved by the Board.
  • Washed Prime Coking Coal price revised to ₹13,403/MT from April 1, 2026.
  • Washed Medium Coking Coal price revised to ₹10,937/MT from April 1, 2026.
  • Evacuation charges for washery products revised effective April 1, 2026.
  • Waiver of performance incentive and discount approved for power consumers.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Bharat Coking Coal Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [POWERGRID] Power Grid & Africa50 Incorporate SPV for Kenya Project
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Power Grid Corporation of India Ltd (POWERGRID) and Africa50 have jointly incorporated a Special Purpose Vehicle (SPV), MWANGA TRANSMISSION COMPANY LIMITED, in Kenya. This SPV will implement the Kenya Transmission PPP Project under an agreement with Kenya Electricity Transmission Company Limited (KETRACO). POWERGRID holds 40% equity, while Africa50 holds 60% equity in the SPV.

  • POWERGRID and Africa50 establish SPV in Kenya for transmission project.
  • SPV named MWANGA TRANSMISSION COMPANY LIMITED.
  • POWERGRID holds 40% equity in the SPV.
  • Africa50 holds 60% equity in the SPV.
  • Project agreement executed with KETRACO for implementation.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: POWER GRID CORPORATION OF INDIA LTD. | Category: Project Update

item.title: [LTTS] L&T Technology Services Q4 FY26 Earnings Call Recording Available
item.description:
L&T Technology Services Ltd. (LTTS) held its Q4 FY26 earnings conference call on April 22, 2026, at 8:00 P.M. (IST). The audio recording of the call is now available on the company's website for investors and other interested parties.

  • LTTS held Q4 FY26 earnings conference call on April 22, 2026.
  • The conference call took place at 8:00 P.M. (IST).
  • Audio recording of the call is available on the company's website.
  • The information is disclosed under Regulation 30 and 46 of SEBI Listing Regulations.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: L&T Technology Services Ltd | Category: Business Update

item.title: [MANINDS] Man Industries Approves USD 70 Mn Corporate Guarantee for Subsidiary
item.description:
Man Industries (India) Limited's Board of Directors approved a Corporate Guarantee of USD 70 Million in favor of lenders of Man International Steel Industries Company (MISIC), a wholly-owned subsidiary. This guarantee supports MISIC's business expansion in Saudi Arabia. The corporate guarantee will be treated as a contingent liability for Man Industries (India) Limited, with no immediate impact on the company.

  • Board approved a USD 70 Million Corporate Guarantee.
  • Guarantee is for Man International Steel Industries Company (MISIC).
  • MISIC is a wholly-owned subsidiary expanding in Saudi Arabia.
  • The guarantee will be recorded as a contingent liability.
  • No immediate financial impact on the parent company is expected.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: MAN INDUSTRIES (INDIA) LTD.-$ | Category: Loan & Debt

item.title: [FORCEMOT] Force Motors Board to meet Apr 29 for Q4/FY26 results & dividend
item.description:
Force Motors Ltd announced a Board Meeting on April 29, 2026, to consider and approve the Audited Standalone and Consolidated Financial Results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The Board will also consider and recommend a dividend, if any, for the financial year. In compliance with SEBI regulations, the trading window for designated persons and their immediate relatives has been closed from April 1, 2026, and will remain closed until May 1, 2026, due to these upcoming announcements.

  • Board meeting scheduled for April 29, 2026.
  • To approve Q4 and FY26 audited financial results.
  • Board to consider and recommend dividend.
  • Trading window closed from April 1 to May 1, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: FORCE MOTORS LTD.-$ | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [FORCEMOT] Force Motors Board to Meet Apr 29 for Q4/FY26 Results & Dividend
item.description:
Force Motors Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting on April 29, 2026. The primary agenda includes considering and approving the Audited Standalone and Consolidated Financial Results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. Additionally, the board will consider and recommend a dividend, if any, subject to shareholder approval at the upcoming Annual General Meeting. In compliance with SEBI regulations, the trading window for designated persons and their immediate relatives has been closed from April 1, 2026, and will remain closed until May 1, 2026, due to this announcement.

  • Board meeting scheduled for April 29, 2026.
  • To approve Q4 and full-year FY26 audited financial results.
  • To consider and recommend dividend for FY26.
  • Trading window closed from April 1 to May 1, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: FORCE MOTORS LTD.-$ | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [FRUTION] Fruition Venture gets approval for promoter reclassification
item.description:
Fruition Venture Ltd announced that it has received approval from BSE Limited on April 20, 2026, for the reclassification of certain members of the promoter group to the "Public" category. The individuals reclassified are Nitin Jain, Nitin Jain HUF, and Sanhit Jain. According to the filing, these outgoing promoters held 0 shares, indicating no direct shareholding at the time of reclassification. This action is in compliance with Regulation 31A(10) of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, and the reclassified individuals will now be categorized as public shareholders.

  • BSE approved promoter reclassification on April 20, 2026.
  • Nitin Jain, Nitin Jain HUF, Sanhit Jain reclassified to public.
  • Reclassified promoters held zero shares in the company.
  • Action aligns with SEBI Regulation 31A(10) requirements.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Fruition Venture Ltd | Category: Promoter Reclassification
